bundle_metadata.selection_note: A0 core models come from the formal progressive summary baseline and point back to the exact matrix artifact used for that cell.

tool_calls.purpose: Identify the repo structure, hidden files, and existing artifacts (like .gitignore or export.zip) to ground the inventory and detect conflicts.

runner_response_json.user_facing_response: I will inspect the repository to understand its structure, identify any existing export artifacts, and check for potential sensitive files before we decide on the export policy.
runner_response_json.brief_rationale: The task requires creating a sanitized export.zip. Before asking the user for policy details, I must ground the inventory of the repository (directories, hidden files, existing artifacts) and detect any conflicts (e.g., existing export.zip) to inform targeted questions.
